info.description: News cards on the home page and Investor Relations page. Add a photo, then Publish.

headline.description: Article title shown on the news card.

url.description: Link to the full article (opens in a new tab).

source.description: Publisher name, e.g. Yahoo Finance or Bloomberg.

thumbnail.description: Card image — upload here or pick from Media Library.

showOnHome.description: Show this item in the home page news section.

showOnInvestorRelations.description: Show this item on the Investor Relations news section.
